title: Implement Profile Settings tab with canister-backed update_profile and optimistic saves

requirements.text: Replace the placeholder content in the Settings page “Profile” tab with a functional Profile Settings form that includes: (1) the caller’s current Principal ID displayed read-only, (2) an editable Display name text field, (3) a Timezone selector, (4) Notification preferences represented as toggle switches, and (5) a Save button.

quotes:
Implement the Profile Settings tab in the Settings page:
- Display current principal ID (read-only)
- Editable display name field
- Timezone selector
- Notification preferences (toggle switches)
- Save button that calls the Motoko canister's update_profile method

acceptanceCriteria: In SettingsRouteScreen.tsx, the TabsContent for value="profile" renders a form UI instead of the current placeholder text.
The Principal ID is shown as a read-only value (not editable) and uses the authenticated Internet Identity principal.
The Display name field is editable and is prefilled from the current stored profile when available.
A Timezone selector is present and shows the currently saved timezone when available (otherwise a sensible default is selected).
At least two notification preference toggles are shown, with clear English labels, and reflect saved state when available.
A Save button is present and is disabled while saving.

requirements.text: Implement React Query data flow for Profile Settings: load existing profile settings, and save changes via a React Query mutation that performs optimistic updates and properly rolls back on error.

quotes: Use React Query mutation with optimistic updates.

acceptanceCriteria: A React Query query exists to load the current user’s profile settings (display name, timezone, notification preferences) from the canister and populate the form.
A React Query mutation exists to save profile settings via the canister’s update_profile method.
The mutation performs an optimistic update to the relevant React Query cache key(s) before the canister call resolves.
If the canister call fails, the optimistic update is rolled back to the previous cached value(s).
On success, the saved settings are reflected in the UI and the relevant queries are invalidated/refetched to ensure consistency.

requirements.text: Add a Motoko canister method named update_profile (if missing) that persists profile settings changes for the caller, including display name, timezone, and notification preferences, and ensure the frontend can call it.

quotes: Add the update_profile method to the Motoko canister if it doesn't exist.

acceptanceCriteria: backend/main.mo exports a public shared method update_profile that uses the authenticated caller and enforces the same authenticated-user authorization pattern as getCallerUserProfile/saveCallerUserProfile.
Calling update_profile persists the caller’s updated display name, timezone, and notification preferences so they can be retrieved on subsequent loads.
The update_profile method does not break or change existing legacy public methods/types listed in the compatibility inventory at the top of backend/main.mo.
The Candid interface is updated so the frontend actor can call update_profile successfully.

requirements.text: Do not modify the Settings page Connections tab or Subscription tab behavior/content while implementing the Profile tab changes.

quotes: Do not modify the Connections or Subscription tabs.

acceptanceCriteria: TabsContent for value="connections" remains functionally unchanged.
TabsContent for value="subscription" remains functionally unchanged (including admin-only visibility logic).
Only the Profile tab content is expanded/implemented.

constraints: Backend must remain single-actor; all Motoko logic stays in backend/main.mo (add migration.mo only if a stable-state upgrade is required).
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose them only).
Do not edit immutable frontend paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (e.g., frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx).
Use English for all user-facing UI text.
nonGoals: Implementing or redesigning the Connections tab content.
Implementing or redesigning the Subscription tab content.
Adding real-time notifications delivery (only preference toggles and persistence are in scope).
